column1: # Debug-bisection probes for the 2d_seg2 hardware-only hang.
# Each probe targets a specific axis: density, grid size, single-vs-dual axis.
#   test_name | grid_rows | num_pes | impl | golden_dir | max_minutes
# Probe A: trivial graph at 8x8 (no edges, but dual-axis fabric active)
#          PASS => density triggers; HANG => grid alone triggers
# Probe B: dense graph, single row (col-chain unused)
#          PASS => col-chain is the failing route
# Probe C: dense graph, minimal dual-axis (4 cols x 2 rows)
#          HANG => simplest failing config; ideal repro for kernel inspection
